title: Midshipmaid Gob
writer: Stafford Dickens, Ian Hay, Stephen King-Hall
actors: Jessie Matthews, A.W. Baskcomb, Basil Sydney
plot: Sir Percy Newbiggin visits the fleet to find ways to economize Naval expenditures. Daughter Celia tags along, and organizes a morale-boosting show utilizing ship-board talent. Her fiancé shows up, and romantic complications ensue.
